title: PUT partial-update cannot set year to 0 or clear string fields
evidence: app.go:225-236 — updateBook keeps the existing value whenever req.Title==""/req.Author==""/req.Year==0/req.ISBN=="", so a client can never blank a field or set year to 0
suggestion: Use pointer fields (*string/*int) or a presence map to distinguish 'omitted' from 'set to zero value'

title: Line coverage 60% — main/server bootstrap and DB error paths untested
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.6; main(), initDB() error branches, and 500-path handlers in app.go are not exercised by app_test.go
suggestion: Add tests for initDB failure and a DB-error handler path, or accept as bootstrap code that need not be unit-tested
